name: logic-training-platform
description: 逻辑思维训练平台 - 全栈项目

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && node server.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
